reference: I have had pain on my right side, near the lower abdomen or appendix area. The pain for the last three or four weeks has come and gone, but for the past few days, it has been constant. My abdominal area is constantly gurgling, but I am not hungry, and I feel pressure on that same side. Sometimes the pain is a little higher, just between my rib cages, and every now and then, I experience extreme sharp pains. I have also been quite tired lately and have experienced a loss of appetite. What could this be, if anything? Also, my stool has been a seaweed green color, and it has never done that before; it has only been this way for the past few days, coinciding with the pain.
text: I have had pain on my right side near the lower abdomen or pelvic area. The pain for the last few years or weeks has been gone, but for the past few days it has been constant. An abdominal area constantly borging, but I am not hungry, and I feel pressure on that same side. Sometimes the pain is even higher, but between the ribs. I never know when. I experience extreme sharp pains. I have also been quite tired and experienced a loss of appetite. I could eat anything. Also, my stool has been a smooth green color, and it has never been that before. It has only been this way for past few days. Contradictory pain.
